REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (90 Argonaut Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94134)
Off Calendar Jul-21-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Dennis Vann appeared in person for Anjie Versher (petitioner).
Wendy Gibson appeared via zoom for and with Mirzett Evans.
Trent Zhu (realtor for buyers) appeared in person with Qi Hu and Rongsheng Liang.
Whitney Young appeared via zoom (pro per) (objector).

Mr. Young objects to the sale of the real property, that he never received a copy of the trust, and that he received notice of the hearing one week prior.

The sale was confirmed at $750,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed January 15, 2024. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property. Matter is taken under submission with the intent to grant. No additional bond is required.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

First Account And Report Of Successor Trustee, Petition For Its Settlement Thereof And Payment Of Attorney Fees To Successor'S Trustee'S Attorney
Off Calendar Feb-26-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via videoconference):

Dennis Vann, Esq., for Anjie Versher, successor Trustee.
Wendy Gibson, Esq., for and with Rachell Evans, interested party.

At the outset, the court notes the procedural discrepancies with the proof of service due to the unreadable remote access information attributable to what appears to be an issue with Mr. Vann's printer. The court then points to Mr. Vann's discrepancy in the dates that services were rendered, as submitted in his fee declaration. After additional discussion, the court advises that it intends to take the matter under submission with the intent to grant attorney's fees in the amount of $2,565.00. No objections to the preceding are presented.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Nov-21-2023 Off Calendar

First Account And Report Of Successor Trustee, Petition For Its Settlement Thereof And Payment Of Attorney Fees To Successor'S Trustee'S Attorney
Off Calendar Nov-21-2023 Continued To Dec-26-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PCN-19-302750 Conservatorship of Marion Hall and PTR-23-306263 In the matter of the Marion Hall Revocable Trust.

Appearances: Dennis Vann appeared via zoom for and with Anjie Versher (conservator).
Wendy Gibson appearing via zoom for and with Rachel Evans (objector).
Deborah Fox (Court appointed counsel) appearing via zoom for Marion Hall (conservatee).
Whitney Young appeared via zoom in propria persona.
Anthony Young appeared via zoom in propria persona.

In the Conservatorship matter the Court issues sanctions in the amount of $250.00 against Dennis Vann Pursuant to CCP 128 payable within 10 days of the order. Second Amended first account of conservatorship etc., the matter is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

In the Trust matter, Order of status hearing etc., is ordered off calendar.
Discussion was held regarding the filing of a new petition yesterday, that it has a hearing date of February 27th 2024, and that Ms. Fox was advised by the Court to file a petition for her fees and discharge.

Mr. Vann stated that he will be filing a fee declaration to resolve the issues. First account and report of successor trustee is continued to December 26, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Papers to be filed by December 12, 2023. Objections to be filed by December 19, 2023.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported.

First Account And Report Of Successor Trustee, Petition For Its Settlement Thereof And Payment Of Attorney Fees To Successor'S Trustee'S Attorney
Off Calendar Oct-04-2023 Continued To Nov-21-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
The following matters were heard: PCN-19-302750 Conservatorship of Marion Hall and PTR-23-306263 In the matter of the Marion Hall Revocable trust.

Appearances: Anjie Versher appearing via zoom (conservator).
Wendy Gibson appearing via zoom for and with Rachel Evans (objector).
Nancy Lofdahl (Court appointed counsel) appearing via zoom for Marion Hall (conservatee).
Rich Francechini appeared via zoom for Dominic Hall.
Whitney Young appeared via zoom in propria persona.
Anthony Young appeared via zoom in propria persona.

Ms. Versher stated that only one of the annuities was resolved, that $14,720.06 was placed in Ms. Hall's conservatorship to pay towards her care. Ms. Gibson stated that the annuities are under her client's name, that she cannot find them, that mediation never took place. All parties agree that they had a lengthy zoom meeting that was unsuccessful.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to Dennis Vann (attorney) to appear on November 21, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 per ccp 128 should not be imposed against him and for failure to appear. First account and report of successor trustee and Second amended first account of conservators etc., is also continued to that date.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Wong. Not reported.
